arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on transfer news, Werner, Bergvall and no sympathy for Arsenal
arts.sum: Postecoglou provided an update on Richarlison's fitness, a new injury in the camp, spoke about the latest transfer news in and out of the club as well as some abuse he received at Tamworth and the head coach covered plenty of other topics around the team and the game. Both teams have injuries, is there no good or bad time to play this game?

arts.ttl: Tottenham team confirmed vs Arsenal as Lucas Bergvall starts again with James Maddison on bench
arts.sum: Both sides come into the game having played extra-time in their FA Cup ties at the weekend, Spurs eventually overcoming non-league Tamworth and Arsenal going out of the competition following a penalty shoot-out with 10-man Manchester United. Ange Postecoglou has named his Tottenham to face Arsenal in the latest north London derby in the Premier League at the Emirates Stadium on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: ENIC increase share in Tottenham Hotspur with £11.7m capital boost
arts.sum: Spurs have confirmed on Companies House on Wednesday a statement of capital following an allotment of shares on December 31 last month 2024 to the tune of £11,740,558.15 On the club's website, it has been confirmed that the percentage of ENIC's ownership of the club increased slightly by 0.33% last month with that move. A discretionary trust, of which certain members of Mr J Lewis's family are potential beneficiaries, ultimately owns 70.12% of the share capital of ENIC."

arts.ttl: Why is frustration growing at Arteta's Arsenal?
arts.sum: As Arsenal prepare to host Tottenham in the Premier League, BBC Sport looks at why frustration is beginning to grow at the club.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Zubimendi RESPONDS, Vlahovic CONSPIRACY, Jorginho TALKS
arts.sum: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Zubimendi RESPONDS, Vlahovic CONSPIRACY, Jorginho TALKS Following the news of Arsenal having 'virtually completed' a deal to sign Martin Zubimendi in the summer, Spanish media has sought to play down the links with the Gunners.

arts.ttl: Tottenham fans furious after ref's mistake before Arsenal goal - and VAR couldn't step in
arts.sum: Tottenham supporters have been venting their frustrations online after Arsenal benefitted from a dubious corner call to equalise against them in the north London derby

arts.ttl: Arsenal score controversial equaliser in north London derby - as refereeing error leads to Dominic Solanke's own goal with Tottenham players left fuming
arts.sum: The Gunners staged a comeback in the game after falling behind to Son Heung-min's opener, with Gabriel first heading Declan Rice's corner into Solanke, with the ball deflected.

arts.ttl: Police launch investigation into online abuse of Arsenal striker Kai Havertz's wife
arts.sum: Police are investigating online abuse received by the wife of Arsenal forward Kai Havertz. Sophia Havertz shared on social media direct messages sent to her after Arsenal was knocked out of the FA Cup by Manchester United on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal players pay tribute to team-mate Gabriel Jesus ahead of north London derby after the Brazilian striker suffered a season-ending knee injury
arts.sum: Jesus was stretchered off in the first half of Sunday's FA Cup penalty shootout defeat by Manchester United , and it was confirmed on Tuesday that he has suffered an ACL injury.

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling Named & Ranked His Top 5 Favourite Players Of All Time
arts.sum: The Arsenal man had some very interesting choices in his list of the five best players ever
